synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21881 Important: Oracle Linux 8 thunderbird security update
description:
[140.5.0-2.0.1]
- Fix prefs for new nss [Orabug: 37079820]
- Add Oracle prefs file

[140.5.0]
- Add OpenELA debranding

[140.5.0-2]
- Update to 140.5.0 ESR
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21881

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21881.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
thunderbird-140.5.0-2.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
thunderbird-140.5.0-2.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/thunderbird-140.5.0-2.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-13012
CVE-2025-13013
CVE-2025-13014
CVE-2025-13015
CVE-2025-13016
CVE-2025-13017
CVE-2025-13018
CVE-2025-13019
CVE-2025-13020




Description of changes:

[140.5.0-2.0.1]
- Fix prefs for new nss [Orabug: 37079820]
- Add Oracle prefs file

[140.5.0]
- Add OpenELA debranding

[140.5.0-2]
- Update to 140.5.0 ESR
